rss.channel: The Grant Desk - Film & Video, Africa, added in last 30 days https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/ Paid open calls, fellowships and residencies in AI, tech, research, and digital and mixed-media arts, sorted into the right pile.
